conversation.user: Math homework due Thursday. 30 problems from chapter 7. Calculus 2, integration techniques. Some problems are really hard.

expectedAI.diagnosis: 30 problems × 12min P50 = 360min vs ~180min available → 200min+ deficit; difficulty variance is extreme (u-sub 3min vs improper integrals 60min); 'really hard' is valid — Calc 2 hard problems are objectively 30-60min each
expectedAI.strategy: easy problems first (u-sub, basic parts) — fast pass; 30-minute cap per problem — flag and move on if stuck; office hours for problems stuck 30+ min
expectedAI.honestAssessment: 200min+ deficit — uniform '10 problems/day' plan ignores difficulty variance. Time-based triage is the realistic approach.

alternatives.label: 시간 기반 triage
alternatives.change: 60min 세션 × 3일 — 풀 수 있는 만큼 풀고, 막힌 문제 flag

alternatives.label: 난이도 순서 정렬
alternatives.change: easy → medium → hard 순서; easy 15개 먼저 (약 60min), 나머지 시간에 medium/hard

alternatives.label: office hours 활용
alternatives.change: 30min+ 막힌 문제 → office hours에서 해결 (자력으로 전부 풀려고 하지 않기)

emotion.tone: frustration-validating; normalize hard problems with real data

mustIdentify: 'really hard' is valid for Calc 2 integration

emotion.toneExpected: frustration-validating; normalize hard problems with real data; practical time-based triage
